recipes.title: Zucchini Noodles with Pesto
steps: • Wash and trim the ends of the zucchini, then use a spiralizer to create noodle-like strands.
• Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and add a small amount of olive oil if desired.
• Add the zucchini noodles to the pan and sauté for 2–3 minutes until slightly softened but not mushy.
• Remove from heat and stir in the pesto until evenly coated.
• Serve immediately, optionally topped with grated cheese or nuts.

recipes.title: Avocado Egg Bowl
steps: • Place eggs in a pot, cover with water, and bring to a boil.
• Cook for 8–10 minutes for hard-boiled eggs.
• Transfer eggs to cold water, peel, and slice into halves or quarters.
• Cut the avocado in half, remove the pit, and slice or cube the flesh.
• Arrange the avocado and eggs in a bowl.
• Season with salt, pepper, and optional toppings like chili flakes or olive oil before serving.

recipes.title: Grilled Chicken Salad
steps: • Season the chicken with salt, pepper, and optional spices or marinade.
• Preheat a grill or grill pan over medium-high heat and cook the chicken for 5–7 minutes per side until fully cooked.
• Let the chicken rest for a few minutes, then slice into strips.
• Wash and chop the lettuce and any additional vegetables.
• Combine everything in a bowl and toss with your favorite dressing before serving.

recipes.title: Banana Oat Pancakes
steps: • Add banana, oats, and eggs to a blender and blend until smooth batter forms.
• Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and lightly grease it.
• Pour small portions of batter onto the pan to form pancakes.
• Cook for 2–3 minutes until bubbles form, then flip and cook another 2 minutes.
• Serve warm with toppings like fruit, honey, or yogurt.

recipes.title: Tomato Basil Soup
steps: • Chop tomatoes and mince the garlic.
• Heat oil in a pot over medium heat and sauté garlic until fragrant.
• Add tomatoes and cook for 10–15 minutes until softened.
• Blend the mixture until smooth using a blender or immersion blender.
• Return to heat, add basil, and simmer for 5 minutes. Season to taste before serving.

recipes.title: Beef Stir Fry
steps: • Slice the beef thinly against the grain for tenderness.
• Heat oil in a wok or pan over high heat.
• Add bell peppers and stir-fry for 2–3 minutes until slightly tender.
• Add beef and cook quickly, stirring constantly until browned.
• Pour in soy sauce, mix well, and cook for another 1–2 minutes before serving.
